data.title: Red Cross aids thousands after early 2026 disasters, as forecasters warn of elevated spring risks nationwide
data.description: An organization is advocating for Disaster Relief contributions on Red Cross Giving Day, scheduled for March 25. With experts cautioning about heightened spring storm, flood, and wildfire threats across the country, the American Red Cross is calling on individuals to make donations on Giving Day to support families in need. This event aims to gather support for disaster response efforts during a critical period. It encourages people to contribute towards the cause to assist vulnerable families facing emergencies.

data.title: Polkadot aims for $1.53 bounce as price sits at $1.40, RSI at 42.67. Possible recovery to $1.53 if $1.37 holds.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DOT is currently trading at $1.40, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 42.67. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a recovery to $1.53 resistance level if the bulls are able to maintain support at $1.37 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: ModulEdge and Comino Partner to Deliver Turnkey On-Premise AI Infrastructure for European Enterprises
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 24, 2026, ModulEdge, a company based in Prague specializing in modular data centers, disclosed a new partnership with Comino, a prominent provider of liquid cooling solutions from Riga, Latvia. The collaboration aims to provide advanced on-premise AI infrastructure to customers across Europe and the MENA region. This initiative is set to combine ModulEdge's expertise in modular data centers with Comino's innovative liquid cooling technology to deliver enhanced integrated solutions.

data.title: Robo.ai Initiates Revenue Recognition for Intelligent Data Business and Advances Tens of Thousands of Hours of Capacity Cooperation Across the Middle East and Asia
data.description: Dubai, United Arab Emirates - On March 24, 2026, Robo.ai Inc. disclosed its intention to expand its intelligent data business segment. The company, trading on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AIIO, unveiled plans to grow its capacity following the successful delivery of the first set of real-world interaction data. data.title: UTStarcom Reports Unaudited Financial Results for Second Half and Full Year 2025
data.description: UTStarcom, a leading global provider of telecommunications infrastructure, has released its unaudited financial results for the six months and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol UTSI, is headquartered in Hangzhou, China. Additionally, UTStarcom has offered a business update alongside this financial report.

data.title: MATIC aims for $0.45 as RSI hovers at 38. Currently trading at $0.38. Technical analysis hints at potential recovery.
data.description: The MATIC cryptocurrency is currently trading at $0.38, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 38. Analysts indicate a possible recovery to $0.45 if the current support level remains stable, despite bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD).

data.title: Cardinal Health to Announce Third-Quarter Results for Fiscal Year 2026 on April 30
data.description: In Dublin, Ohio, on March 24, 2026, Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) announced their intention to unveil their third-quarter financial results for the fiscal year 2026 on April 30, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. A live webcast discussing the results will also be accessible.

data.title: Energy Giant Equinor Expands Brazil Renewables Footprint
data.description: Equinor ASA (NYSE: EQNR) announced the acquisition of the 230-megawatt Esquina do Vento onshore wind project from Vestas Wind Systems A/S, expanding its power portfolio in Brazil. Located in Rio Grande do Norte, the project comprises 51 wind turbines and will be developed by Equinor's subsidiary, Rio Energy, with expectations of double-digit returns. Forecasted to produce approximately 1 terawatt-hour of power annually, this wind complex will significantly boost the region's energy capacity. By integrating wind, solar, and energy trading within the market, Equinor aims to enhance grid utilization, reduce intermittency, and ensure robust returns. Through its energy trading unit, Danske Commodities A/S, Equinor will sell the power generated by the project. Highlighting Brazil as a strategic market for their long-term growth, this deal aligns with Equinor's market approach and signifies a step forward in bolstering their presence in the region.
